aweme_list.desc: The One Move that can get your Mortgage Application Declined Just because you’ve got your mortgage offer in hand doesn’t mean you’re in the clear! 🏡💥 One of the biggest mistakes people make is taking out NEW CREDIT after getting their mortgage offer. Whether it’s a car loan 🚗, Klarna order 🛍️, or a new credit card 💳 — it could RUIN everything. Here’s the truth: mortgage lenders often run a final credit check just before completion — and if they see new debt or credit applications, it raises red flags 🚩. Why? Because it changes your affordability. That new monthly payment might push your finances over the edge in their eyes. And yes, even if you were approved before, they can withdraw the offer last minute. Brutal, right? Think of your mortgage journey like walking a tightrope: you need balance. ⚖️ No sudden spending. No fresh debt. No financial surprises. Lenders want to see stability from the day of application right through to completion day. So, if you’re tempted to treat yourself before the keys are in your hand — DON’T. Wait until after you’ve moved in and the mortgage is completed ✔️. Because trust me, you don’t want to be the one who lost their dream home because of an Amazon binge. 🧠 Stay smart. Stay approved. 📌 Like, save, and share this with someone buying a home right now! ⸻ #MortgageTips #CreditCheck #HomeBuyersUK #FinancialEducation #MortgageAdvice
